title: Earlier Transition And Operations-Visibility Packet-History Residue Split Authoring
objective: Convert the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency packet-history residue into separately executable follow-on packets instead of reopening the mutation-seam, AI-boundary, and Operations Visibility records as one broad archive-demotion lane.
dependency_note: After Packet 186, the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 residue no longer centers on publication-gate or hold-boundary cleanup. The next current-looking surfaces split into two branches: a transition family across Packets 033 through 041 that moves from mutation-seam closure into Olares-first AI workflow boundary, publication, and defer decisions, and an Operations Visibility family across Packets 042 through 053 that records that business lane's reopening, schema tranche decisions, and runtime-consumer executions. This packet authors those follow-ons separately so the remaining residue stays bounded by branch rather than being reopened as one broad 2026-05-06 rewrite.
authoring_scope: Create a ready execution packet for the earlier mutation-seam and AI-boundary transition family across Packets 033 through 041.
Create a ready execution packet for the earlier Operations Visibility family across Packets 042 through 053.
Update repo-owned status routing so the split is explicit and the next work can proceed as separate residue slices.
forbidden_scope: editing the historical target transition or Operations Visibility files themselves in this authoring packet
success_criteria: A ready packet spec exists for the earlier mutation-seam and AI-boundary transition family.
A ready packet spec exists for the earlier Operations Visibility decision/execution family.
PROJECT_STATUS.md records the split so the next lane is explicit and bounded.
next_action: Execute Packet 188 or Packet 189 next. If both are needed, keep them as separate residue slices.
